records.ety: [L. evanescere; e out + vanescere to vanish, fr. vanus empty, vain. See Vain, and cf. Evanish.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Evanesced (v`*nst"); p. pr. & vb. n. Evanescing. (v`*ns"sng).]

defs: To vanish away; to become dissipated and disappear, like vapor.
quotes: I believe him to have evanesced or evaporated.
